content: Senior Java Developer with over 5 years of experience designing and implementing enterprise-grade, cloud-native applications across E-commerce, healthcare, and media domains. Built and integrated secure international payment terminals for ECP website using Authorize.net and Stripe, enabling seamless global e-commerce transactions. Experienced in applying data structures and algorithms including sorting, searching, hashing, and index bucketing to optimize performance and data processing efficiency.

Expert in Java 8/11/17, Spring Boot microservices, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and event-driven architectures with Kafka and RabbitMQ. Skilled in AWS and Azure cloud platforms, containerization using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm. Proficient in OAuth2, JWT, RBAC-based authentication and API security best practices.

Experienced in database development using Oracle, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis. Strong in CI/CD automation using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and Azure DevOps. Adept in Agile/Scrum methodologies, cloud cost optimization, observability with ELK, Prometheus, and Grafana, and AI-driven automation for performance improvements.
Languages & Frameworks: Java 8/11/17, Python, TypeScript, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring MVC, Spring Security, Hibernate, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Microservices Architecture.
Frontend Technologies: Angular 14+, React.js, Next.js, JavaScript ES6+, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3.

Cloud & DevOps: AWS EKS, EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudWatch, Azure App Services, Azure DevOps, Blob Storage, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code.
Databases: Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB.
Messaging & Streaming: Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, Kafka Streams, AWS SNS/SQS.
Testing: JUnit5, TestNG, Mockito, REST Assured, Jest, TDD methodologies.
Monitoring: ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk, CloudWatch, Log4j, Application Insights.
Security & API Management: OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, SSO, Swagger, API Gateway, TLS/HTTPS, HIPAA and SOC2 compliance.

Built the front-end architecture for Ethics Consulting Partners (ECP), a multi-module e-commerce platform combining Corporate Training and Promo Store, using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Delivered responsive, high-performance UI aligned with Figma designs.
Developed backend services using NestJS and REST APIs for authentication, course management, B2B user accounts, and product catalogs. Ensured scalability, maintainability, and secure data flow.

Integrated Absorb LMS via REST APIs, enabling enterprise-grade training content sync, user progress tracking, and SSO experiences. Built custom B2B modules supporting client-specific configurations and dashboards.
Developing an AI-powered chatbot assistant using Claude API and Next.js to enhance user engagement and support automation across the ECP platform.
Implemented intelligent search, sorting, and filtering logic in Next.js for dynamic courses and product pages. Optimized performance with caching and efficient data-fetching strategies.
Integrated secure payment gateways including Authorize.net and Stripe. Built scalable cart and checkout system using Zustand with real-time state updates and cart persistence.
Implemented Jest tests, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines, and Docker for automated deployments. Deployed ECP web apps on a VPS using Nginx for SSL termination and load balancing.
Developed Spring Boot microservices for EMR systems using JWT-secured REST and GraphQL APIs ensuring HIPAA and FHIR compliance.
Optimized high-volume appointment scheduling modules using slot bucketing, hashing, and index-based optimizations, improving performance by 40%.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries, implemented Redis caching, reduced database load, and improved API response times by 30%.
Automated CI/CD workflows with Jenkins and Docker, deploying microservices on AWS EKS with EC2, S3, and RDS integrations.
Implemented real-time monitoring using ELK Stack and Splunk to proactively identify and resolve issues. Worked in Agile/Scrum methodology using Jira.
Developed modular Java backend services for content management systems to improve code maintainability and reusability.
Optimized JSP components and Servlets for improved application performance. Applied TDD with JUnit and Mockito.
Automated Linux deployments using Bash scripts and implemented centralized error logging for better fault traceability.
Master of Science in Computer and Information Systems, Saint Louis University, USA (Dec 2024).
AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02).
